name: Online Stream Tail Gravimetric Validation v1
description: Local gravimetric online-stream calibration runs with enough saved artifacts to replay or reconstruct flow and tail selection decisions.

density_layer.compatibility_note: gravimetric_volume_nl is density-corrected. gravimetric_volume_nl_water_density and volume_error_vs_gravimetric_nl preserve the original 1.0 g/mL water-density calculation.

included: run folder has flow_fit.json, tail_fit.json, frames.jsonl, events.jsonl, and captures
selection_criteria.gravimetric_volume_note: gravimetric_volume_nl is density-corrected. gravimetric_volume_nl_water_density uses Mass/print with a 1.0 g/mL density assumption.
